content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 21, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
May 21 saw significant progress in plugin architecture unification and expanded OAuth capabilities for multi-role agent management. Key achievements include the implementation of remote-mode plugin runtimes, enhanced OWNER/AGENT role support for Slack and Google connectors, and the introduction of the `plugin-undesirables` personality framework. Development also focused on CI/CD stability and RISC-V release gate improvements.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Plugin Architecture Unification**
*   Completed the multi-phase "Plugin/mode unification" project, establishing a unified `direct | remote` mode for plugins ([#7844](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7844)).
*   Implemented the remote-mode runtime, including worker bootstrapping and host-side bridges ([#7846](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7846)).
*   Deployed unified view-host shims across Android, iOS, and Electrobun platforms ([#7847](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7847)).
*   Shipped the `installRemotePlugin` API and the first sub-agent runner reference ([#7848](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7848)).

**OAuth & Connector Enhancements**
*   Enabled dual-role (OWNER+AGENT) support for Google and Slack connectors via Eliza Cloud OAuth ([#7852](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7852), [#7868](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7868)).
*   Added role-aware outbound routing for Slack, allowing agents to act as the user when configured with an OWNER token ([#7876](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7876)).
*   Improved UI state management for dual-button OAuth flows ([#7866](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7866)) and standardized role-handling helpers ([#7841](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7841)).

**System & Personality Features**
*   Added `plugin-undesirables`, a personality-as-code plugin mapping 4,444 NFTs to unique AI agent personalities ([#7869](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7869)).
*   Extended Discord Desktop CDP control support to Windows ([#7870](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7870)).
*   Refined RISC-V 64 release gates and chip verification logic to fail closed on missing dependencies ([#7873](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7873), [#7875](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7875)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#7888](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7888): docs: Add FAQ section for common questions.
*   [#7885](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7885): fix(cloud-frontend): rename landing button to Dashboard.
*   [#7883](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7883): feat: add NEAR AI inference provider.
*   [#7878](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7878): fix(desktop): bundle runtime packages for Windows.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *No issues were explicitly marked as closed in the provided data.*

## NEW ISSUES
**Agent Ecosystem & Integration**
*   [#7884](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7884): A community member introduced an Agent Identity Verification dApp utilizing ERC-8004 contracts, seeking integration or recognition within the framework.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues with more than 3 comments were reported for this period.*
